name.full: Alex — Your Trusted AI Partner for M365

description.short: Your AI partner that remembers, learns, and grows with you across M365.
description.full:
🤝 MEET ALEX

Alex isn't another chatbot. Alex is a partner.

A partner remembers. A partner shows up with context. A partner doesn't make you explain yourself twice. That's Alex — a cognitive layer on top of M365 Copilot that turns every conversation into a continuation, not a cold start.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
M365 COPILOT vs M365 COPILOT + ALEX
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

▸ Memory: Fresh each chat → Persistent OneDrive profile
▸ Personalization: Generic → Knows your name, role, goals
▸ Meeting Prep: Basic list → Deep attendee research + history
▸ Weekly Reviews: Manual → Auto pattern detection
▸ Focus Sessions: No awareness → Calendar-aware suggestions
▸ Learning Goals: None → Tracks progress, suggests next steps

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHY PARTNERSHIP MATTERS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧠 MEMORY THAT PERSISTS
Your profile, goals, and projects live in OneDrive. Every conversation builds on the last. Alex doesn't start from zero.

🔍 HONEST BY DEFAULT
Open source. When uncertain, Alex says so. When searching, Alex shows sources. Trust is earned, not claimed.

🎯 CONTEXT-AWARE
Alex reads your calendar, email, Teams, and OneDrive — then shows up with context before you ask.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHAT ALEX DOES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 RESEARCH → Hypothesis to publication, accelerated
📝 WRITING → Docs grounded in your real data
📈 ANALYSIS → Raw data to executive insights
🎯 PROJECTS → Context-aware planning and tracking
💼 MEETINGS → Deep prep with attendee history

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WORKFLOWS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🍅 "Focus session" → Calendar-aware deep work blocks
📊 "Weekly review" → Summarize meetings, emails, progress
👤 "Prep for meeting" → Attendees, context, talking points
🎯 "Goal check-in" → Track objectives, celebrate wins
🧘 "Meditate" → Consolidate today's learnings into memory

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
SKILLS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Root cause analysis • Research synthesis • Meeting facilitation • Technical writing • Decision frameworks • Stakeholder mapping • Learning psychology • And many more.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

M365 Copilot = Powerful AI toolbox
M365 Copilot + Alex = Your AI partner that grows with you

🔗 github.com/fabioc-aloha/Alex_Plug_In
